nasb.text: saying, “In a certain city there was a judge who did not fear God and did not respect man.

esv.text: He said, “In a certain city there was a judge who neither feared God nor respected man.

cnv.text: 他說：“某城裡有一個法官，不懼怕　神，也不尊敬人。

ccb.text: 祂说：“某城有一位既不敬畏上帝也不尊重人的审判官。

csbs.text: 他说：“某城里有一个审判官，他既不敬畏神，也不尊重人。
